headline: Is Conagra Brands (CAG) Now An Opportunity After A 37% One Year Share Price Slide
summary: If you are wondering whether Conagra Brands at around US$14.86 is a bargain or a value trap, the next sections will help you frame that question with numbers rather than headlines. The stock has seen a 2.1% decline over the last 7 days, a 2.0% decline over the last 30 days, and is down 14.1% year to date and 36.9% over the past year, which naturally raises questions about how the market is currently pricing its risks and prospects.
